title: Immersive Interfaces - Quark
description: This texture pack adds special compatibility with Quark, integrating its grooves into the aesthetics of Immersive Interfaces.
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/immersive-interfaces-mod-support-unofficial) ### Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial This texture pack adds special compatibility with Quark, integrating its grooves into the aesthetics of Immersive Interfaces. ### Before: ![be](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ee7a3de352d593104a84d0780b015c028afdae4.png) ### After: ![after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/150d6774647943d0d69c6e1ea9c32228f7e3cabf.png)
